markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan the creation of sales collateral for Surge AI, focusing on introductory materials and capability showcases.](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge AI needs two types of sales collateral: introductory materials for new customers and capability-focused decks for existing clients](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [The company aims for a technical, minimalist approach in their materials, avoiding overly salesy content](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai will provide initial drafts of both an intro deck and a capabilities deck, likely within the next 1-2 days](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

## Topics

### Current Collateral Gaps

  - [Lack of introductory materials for new customers](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
      - [No comprehensive "here's who we are, what we do, proof points" document](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Insufficient evangelization of capabilities to current customers](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
      - [Underestimation of how little existing clients know about Surge AI's full range of services](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Existing materials often plain Google Docs, not matching Surge AI's execution level](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

### Desired Collateral Types

  - [Introductory deck for new customers](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
      - [Overview of Surge AI's identity, services, and proof points](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Monthly capability showcase for existing clients](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
      - [Highlight underutilized services and new capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
      - [Designed for easy sharing, not requiring sales calls](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [General explanatory materials for common inquiries](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
      - [Improved design over current plain document format](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

### Design Approach

  - [Continuation of hyper-minimalist aesthetic](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Technical focus, straight to the point](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Inspiration from 70s-80s design systems and grid layouts](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Balance between information density and aesthetic appeal](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Maintain technical depth without being overly salesy](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Showcase data, samples, and let capabilities speak for themselves](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Challenge: Presenting extensive capabilities without creating overly long decks](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)

### Customization and Editability

  - [Materials should be editable and customizable by the Surge AI team](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

### Example and Inspiration

  - [Web Agents deck mentioned as a good reference](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [Spent significant time and effort on creation](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
      - [Maintains technical focus while being visually appealing](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX.ai to create first drafts of intro deck and capabilities deck within 1-2 days](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Initial focus on skeleton structure and aesthetics for Surge AI's reaction](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Surge AI to review drafts and provide feedback on both design and content](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Iterative process expected as Surge AI refines their collateral strategy](https://fathom.video/share/vvey9FzScbi389EzqSw5bWRxF4JWBBuC?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
